name: Sterling Biotech
message: Sterling Biotech specializes in producing animal-free dairy products under the ORCA brand, as well as gelatin and pharmaceutical products managed in collaboration with Zydus Lifesciences Limited. The company serves a diverse clientele across multiple countries, focusing on innovation and sustainability in its offerings. With a commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, Sterling Biotech aims to lead in the biotechnology sector. Their operations are supported by a dedicated team of professionals and a strong management structure.
